subject: memory: samsung: exynos5422-dmc: Fix refcount leak in of_get_dram_timings

features.path_conditions: of_node_put must be called on np_ddr on every error return path after of_parse_phandle succeeds; pre-patch missed it on three -ENOMEM paths.
features.fit_test_reasoning: of_parse_phandle returns a node pointer with incremented refcount that must be explicitly released via of_node_put. The post-op is a release/cleanup (not data transformation). Missing the call causes a refcount leak (resource leak). Follows acquire/use/release semantics.
